scripts.dev: export NODE_ENV=development && pnpm run build && pnpm run start
scripts.test:naming: node_modules/.bin/esbuild src/test-product-naming.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/test-product-naming.mjs --log-level=warning --external:*.node --external:pg-native '--external:@aws-sdk/*' '--external:@google-cloud/*' '--banner:js=import { createRequire as __cr } from "node:module"; globalThis.require = __cr(import.meta.url);' && node dist/test-product-naming.mjs
scripts.fix:zh-interp: node_modules/.bin/esbuild src/fix-zh-interp-names.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/fix-zh-interp-names.mjs --log-level=warning --external:*.node --external:pg-native '--external:@aws-sdk/*' '--external:@google-cloud/*' '--banner:js=import { createRequire as __cr } from "node:module"; globalThis.require = __cr(import.meta.url);' && node dist/fix-zh-interp-names.mjs
scripts.test:search-normalize: node_modules/.bin/esbuild src/test-search-normalize.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/test-search-normalize.mjs --log-level=warning --external:*.node --external:pg-native '--external:@aws-sdk/*' '--external:@google-cloud/*' '--banner:js=import { createRequire as __cr } from "node:module"; globalThis.require = __cr(import.meta.url);' && node dist/test-search-normalize.mjs
scripts.audit:products: node_modules/.bin/esbuild src/audit-product-duplicates.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/audit-product-duplicates.mjs --log-level=warning --external:*.node --external:pg-native '--external:@aws-sdk/*' '--external:@google-cloud/*' '--banner:js=import { createRequire as __cr } from "node:module"; globalThis.require = __cr(import.meta.url);' && node dist/audit-product-duplicates.mjs
